PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?earthquake ?earthquakeLabel ?magnitude_value WHERE {
  ?earthquake wdt:P31 wd:Q865501 ; wdt:P276 ?location ; wdt:P2527 ?magnitude .
  ?location wdt:P17 wd:Q30 .
  ?magnitude wikibase:quantityValue ?magnitude_value .
  ?earthquake rdfs:label ?earthquakeLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?earthquakeLabel) = 'en')
}
ORDER BY DESC(xsd:float(?magnitude_value))
LIMIT 1
